hibernate-mapping.query: select propertyAudit from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PropertyAudit as propertyAudit, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyBankAccount as cba where propertyAudit.Company=:company and propertyAudit.ClassName='CompanyBankAccount' and propertyAudit.PropertyName='StatusCd' and propertyAudit.ObjectIdentifier=cba.Id and cba.SourceBankAccountId=:sourceCBAId order by propertyAudit.AuditDate
